name: Hexaware Technologies
description: Hexaware Technologies is a global IT services company that provides automation-led, intelligence-driven, and cloud-native digital transformation services. The company serves clients across Banking, Financial Services, Insurance, Healthcare, Manufacturing, and Professional Services verticals.

overview.tagline: Automate Everything, Cloudify Everything, Transform Customer Experiences
highlights: Top 10 IT Services company in India

eligibility.note: M.E./M.Tech candidates generally not eligible for GET role. Mechanical and Civil branches usually not eligible.

recruitmentPattern.source: Based on recent candidate experiences and PrepInsta reports

roles.title: Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET)
roles.description: Mass hiring role for fresh engineering graduates

roles.title: Premier Graduate Engineer Trainee (PGET)
roles.description: Advanced role with coding assessment, for higher-performing candidates

rounds.name: Resume Shortlisting
rounds.description: Initial screening based on academic record, CGPA, and profile criteria. Shortlisted candidates receive a test link.

rounds.name: Online Assessment
rounds.description: Covers Quantitative Aptitude, Logical Reasoning, Verbal Ability, Pseudocode, and Computer Fundamentals.

rounds.name: Coding Test
rounds.description: Only for PGET track. 2-3 coding problems based on arrays, strings, loops, and data structures.

rounds.name: Communication Assessment
rounds.description: AI-proctored English communication test evaluating speaking, listening, reading, and grammar skills.

rounds.name: Technical Interview
rounds.description: Face-to-face or virtual interview. Focuses on programming concepts, projects, data structures, and technical fundamentals.

rounds.name: HR Interview
rounds.description: Cultural fit assessment, behavioral questions, and HR-related queries.

rounds.name: GenAI & Prompt Engineering Assessment
rounds.description: Evaluation of GenAI fundamentals, prompt optimization, RAG pipelines, and enterprise security (prompt injection).

recruitmentPattern.serviceAgreement: 3 years bond with approximately ₹2 Lakhs penalty
tips: Focus heavily on Pseudocode — it's unique to Hexaware's assessment
Strengthen fundamentals: OS, DBMS, Computer Networks
Practice aptitude from previous Hexaware papers
Be ready to discuss your final year project in depth
commonMistakes: Not reading the service agreement carefully

tips: Be confident with atleast one programming language
Be prepared to design a RAG pipeline or explain how to prevent prompt injection vulnerabilities.
